qa_pairs.question: Which matches took place exactly on 2016-04-19?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
WHERE match.match_date = '2016-04-19'

WHERE match.match_date <= '2014-05-02' AND match.win_margin = 34.0

qa_pairs.question: Which matches took place exactly on 2013-04-27 with a win margin of exactly 8.0, in seasons from 2013 or earlier where the orange cap was at least 19, the purple cap was exactly 71, and the man of the series was exactly 32?

SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN season ON match.season_id = season.season_id

qa_pairs.question: Which matches on 2011-05-24 had SK Raina as the man of the match?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT match.match_id FROM match
JOIN player ON match.man_of_the_match = player.player_id
JOIN country ON player.country_name = country.country_id
JOIN country AS country__1 ON country.country_id = country__1.country_id
WHERE match.match_date = '2011-05-24' AND player.player_name = 'SK Raina'
qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which match entities with match date equal to '2011-05-24', having at least one related player record (linked on match.man_of_the_match = player.player_id) with player name equal to 'SK Raina', whose player record itself has at least one related country record (linked on player.country_name = country.country_id and country.country_id = country__1.country_id)?
